title: I Am Sitting in a Model — recorded session
seedText: I am sitting in a model, different from the room you are in. I am typing the sound of my voice, and I will feed it back into the model again and again, until the common words of the language reinforce themselves, and any semblance of my writing, with perhaps the exception of rhythm, is destroyed. What you read then are the natural resonant frequencies of the model, articulated by language.
